content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Anewhope.jpg|thumb|200px|The [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]] of the [[original trilogy]] is released in theaters.]]
A list of events in '''1997''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: Eaten Alive]]'' and ''[[Galaxy of Fear: City of the Dead]]'' published.
*01 – [[Tim Veekhoven|TeeKay-421]] is founded in Belgium.
*01 – [[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition (TPB)|''Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition'' trade paperback]] published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Droids: Rebellion (TPB)|''Star Wars Droids: Rebellion'' trade paperback]] published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 15|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 15]] published.
*01 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shards of Alderaan]]'' published.
*[[January 8|08]] – [[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition 1|''Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition'' 1]] published.
*08 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 4]] published.
*[[January 12|12]] – ''[[A New Hope (Shimmer Book)]]'' published.
*[[January 14|14]] – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope]]'' updated edition published.
*[[January 18|18]] – The ''Special Edition'' of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] makes its world premiere in Los Angeles. [[George Lucas]], [[Mark Hamill]], and [[Carrie Fisher]] attend the premiere.
*18 – [[20th Century Studios|Twentieth Century Fox's]] copyright on ''A New Hope'' is transferred to [[Lucasfilm]] but Fox retains permanent distribution rights to the film.
*[[January 31|31]] – The Special Edition of ''A New Hope'' is released in theaters.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 10|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 10]] published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – ''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 12|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 12]] published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron ½|''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron ½'']] published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 16|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 16]] published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars: Chronicles]]'' published.
*[[February 2|02]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back - The Special Edition]]'' published.
*[[February 3|03]] – ''[[The Haunted Village]]'' released on VHS.
*03 – ''[[The Pirates and the Prince]]'' released on VHS.
*[[February 5|05]] – [[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition 2|''Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition'' 2]] published.
*[[February 6|06]] – ''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' published.
*[[February 12|12]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 5]] published.
*[[February 21|21]] – The [[List of changes in Star Wars re-releases|Special Edition]] of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] is released in theaters.
*[[February 21|21]]-[[February 23|23]], [[February 28|28]] – The debut of [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios|Disney-MGM Studios]]

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End 1|''Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End'' 1]] published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 17|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 17]] published.
*01-[[March 2|02]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios
*[[March 5|05]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Mac (computer)|Mac]]intosh platform.
*05 – [[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition 3|''Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition'' 3]] published.
*[[March 7|07]]-[[March 9|09]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios
*[[March 13|13]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Storybook]]'' published.
*13 – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back: A Storybook]]'' published.
*13 – ''[[Return of the Jedi: A Storybook]]'' published.
*[[March 14|14]] – The [[List of changes in Star Wars re-releases|Special Edition]] of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] is released in theaters.
*14-[[March 16|16]], [[March 21|21]]-[[March 23|23]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios
*?? – ''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire audio drama]]'' released
*?? – [[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']] published.
*?? – ''[[Introductory Adventure Game]]'' published.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: Planet Plague]]'' published.
*01 – [[Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance|''Diversity Alliance'']] published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End 2|''Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End'' 2]] published.
*01 – ''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]'' published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 18|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 18]] published
*[[April 2|02]] – [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (TPB)|''Shadows of the Empire'']] trade paperback published.
*02 – [[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition 4|''Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition'' 4]] published.
*[[April 29|29]] – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' released to the PC platform.
*?? – ''[[Mos Eisley Adventure Set]]'' published.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (TPB)|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'']] trade paperback published.
*01 – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Anakin's Quest]]'' published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End 3|''Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End'' 3]] published.
*01 – [[Dark Force Rising 1|''Dark Force Rising'' 1]] published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 13|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 13]] published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 19|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 19]] published.
*[[May 5|05]] – ''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' published.
*[[May 12|12]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Nightmare Machine]]'' published.
*12 – ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 11|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 11]] published.
*?? – ''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]'' published.

==June==
*[[June 2|02]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 20|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 20]] published.
*[[June 18|18]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 1]] published.
*[[June 22|22]] – [[Don Henderson]] dies.
*[[June 25|25]] – [[Dark Force Rising 2|''Dark Force Rising'' 2]] published.
*[https://starwars.fandom.com/wiki/June_26 26] – Principle photography for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']] begins.
*?? – ''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Tapani Sector Instant Adventures]]'' published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Vader's Fortress]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' published.
*[[July 7|07]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: Ghost of the Jedi]]'' published.
*[[July 14|14]] – ''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]'' published.
*[[July 23|23]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 2]] published.
*[[July 28|28]] – ''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'' published.
*28 – [[Electronic Arts]] acquires [[Maxis]].
*[[July 30|30]] – [[Dark Force Rising 3|''Dark Force Rising'' 3]] published.
*?? – ''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]'' published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 14|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 14]] published.
*[[August 6|06]] – [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Golden Age of the Sith (TPB)|''Tales of the Jedi: The Golden Age of the Sith'']] trade paperback published.
*06 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 21|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 21]] published.
*[[August 11|11]] – ''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' published.
*[[August 13|13]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Murder Most Foul]]'' published.
*13 – ''[[Star Wars: The Special Edition Box Set]]'' published.
*[[August 20|20]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[August 27|27]] – [[Dark Force Rising 4|''Dark Force Rising'' 4]] published.
*[[August 29|29]] – [[Netflix, Inc.]] is founded.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 12|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 12]] published.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 1: Assault on Yavin Four]]'' & ''[[Star Wars Kids 1 (1997)]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Kenobi's Blade]]'' published.
*[[September 3|03]] – ''[[Star Wars Droids: The Protocol Offensive]]'' published.
*03 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 22|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 22]] published.
*[[September 8|08]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: Army of Terror]]'' published.
*08 – ''[[Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays]]'' published.
*[[September 17|17]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 4]] published.
*[[September 24|24]] – [[Dark Force Rising 5|''Dark Force Rising'' 5]] published.
*[[September 30|30]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] finishes.
*?? – ''[[Darth Vader's Mission: The Search for the Secret Plans]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[R2-D2's Mission: A Little Hero's Journey]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 35|''Star Wars Insider'' 35]] published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Shadows of the Empire'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*01 – ''[[Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' trade paperback published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 2: Escape from Thyferra]]'' & ''[[Star Wars Kids 2 (1997)]]'' released.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 23|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 23]] published.
*01 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Bounty]]'' published.
*[[October 9|09]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'' released on the PC platform.
*[[October 22|22]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 5]] published.
*[[October 29|29]] – [[Dark Force Rising 6|''Dark Force Rising'' 6]] published.
*[[October 31|31]] – ''[[Monopoly Star Wars]]'' released on the PC platform.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: Masters of Teräs Käsi]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation|PlayStation]] platform.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Trilogy Sourcebook, Special Edition]]'' published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 15|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 15]] published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 3: Attack on Delrakkin]]'' & ''[[Star Wars Kids 3 (1997)]]'' released.
*[[November 3|03]] – ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' published.
*03 – ''[[Tales from the Empire]]'' published.
*[[November 4|04]] – ''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' published.
*[[November 5|05]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 24|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 24]] published.
*[[November 10|10]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Brain Spiders]]'' published.
*[[November 12|12]] – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Phantom Affair (TPB)]]'' published.
*[[November 14|14]] – [[Ivanna Sakhno]] is born.
*[[November 19|19]] – ''[[Shadow Stalker]]'' published.
*[[November 21|21]] – [[Jack Purvis]] dies.
*[[November 26|26]] – [[The Last Command 1|''The Last Command'' 1]] published.
*[[November 30|30]] – [[X-Wing series (computer games)|''X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power'']] released on the PC platform.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 13|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 13]] published.
*?? – ''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]'' published.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – [[Boba Fett ½]] published.
*01 – [[Crimson Empire 0|''Crimson Empire'' 0]] previewed online at [[StarWars.com]]
*01 – [[Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the Liquidator|''Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the'' Liquidator]] & ''[[Star Wars Kids 4 (1997)]]'' released.
*[[December 3|03]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] published.
*[[December 7|07]] – [[Crimson Empire 1|''Crimson Empire'' 1]] published.
*[[December 24|24]] – [[The Last Command 2|''The Last Command'' 2]] published.
*?? – ''[[Stock Ships]]'' published.

==Unknown==
*Founding of the [[501st Legion (fan organization)|501st Legion]].
*– ''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Four — The Best of the Journal]]'' published.
*– ''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'' published.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 32|''Star Wars Insider'' 32]] published in Winter.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 33|''Star Wars Insider'' 33]] published in Spring.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 34|''Star Wars Insider'' 34]] published in Summer.
*[[Felicita Victoria Prokešová]] is born.

----
